message:
Add Claude plugin project type detection

The release command now detects `.claude-plugin/plugin.json` and provides
instructions to update the version file during releases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+---
+title: Claude plugin project type detection
+type: feature
+authors:
+  - mavam
+  - claude
+created: 2026-01-15T07:46:01.522467Z
+---
+
+The `/ship:release` command now automatically detects Claude Code plugins and
+knows to update the version in `.claude-plugin/plugin.json`. This eliminates
+manual version file discovery during plugin releases.

@@ -109,6 +109,12 @@ Example files that contain an authoritative version:
 - package.json
 - plugin.json
 
+<project type="claude-plugin">
+
+Update the version in `.claude-plugin/plugin.json`.
+
+</project>
+
 <project type="python">
 
 Run with the bump type from step 2:

@@ -1,7 +1,9 @@
 #!/usr/bin/env bash
 # Detects the project type based on configuration files.
 
-if [[ -f pyproject.toml ]]; then
+if [[ -f .claude-plugin/plugin.json ]]; then
+  echo "claude-plugin"
+elif [[ -f pyproject.toml ]]; then
   echo "python"
 elif [[ -f Cargo.toml ]]; then
   echo "rust"
